title: helianthemum microcarpum
intro: Helianthemum microcarpum, also known as rockrose or dwarf rockrose, is a low-growing, shrubby plant belonging to the Cistaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Helianthemum microcarpum has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of rockrose include infusions, teas, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
